revertDetails.name: Go Touch Less Car Wash

First actual touch-less car wash that I’ve seen in Florida (other car wash I went to advertise touchless but it’s actually isn’t touchless). Customers service is really friendly.

revertDetails.name: Laser Car Wash
excerpts: Car wash is not touch free. Card reader does not work, therefore a car wash is not allowed. I would recommend going down the street to the Circle K or 610 Car Wash
